_README: BOP classification rules, decoded from ITRS_DataBaseV.11.1.xlsm.
- VBA module  calculate.bas    -> Purpose (X), P.2 (Y), M2 (AA), USE (AB)
- Sheet       Calculate_Tools  -> the editable tables the VBA reads
Edit this file rather than the VBA. Column letters below refer to the
Recieve / Payment sheets in the workbook.
A = Bank          F = sector code (Payment)   G = counterparty name
H = sector code (Recieve)                     M = raw purpose code
N = country       U = raw amount              W = remark / details
X = final purpose Y = 2-digit  Z = corrected amount  AA = M2  AB = USE

_note: Applied in order; first match wins. Mirrors Calculate_Tools rows 3-9 plus
the extra conditions hard-coded in calculate.bas.
'keep' means leave the raw purpose unchanged.
A manual override in sheet Purpose_Ask always wins over everything here.

rules.why: Interbank deposit placement; keep the financial-account code
Korea remittances booked as deposits are compensation of employees

_note: M2 = does the transaction affect broad money. 'Yes' unless a rule below
fires. Payment has one extra rule that forces Yes first.
USE is NOT a plain Yes/No in this workbook: it also carries labels that
record WHY a record is excluded. Anything other than 'Yes' is out of the
BOP aggregates. Checked in order; first match wins.
Per-currency KIP rate bands. A rate of zero, or outside the band, is an
exception. RateCheck.bas also validates the USD rate against the USD row.
WARNING: the VBA reads Calculate_Tools!A19:C29, but the table starts at
row 14 -- so USD, EUR, CNY, THB and AUD are skipped by the running macro.
CNY and THB are the second and third largest currencies in the data.
The bands below are the full table as written on the sheet.

usdPerUsdBand.note: Exchange_Rates_USD is LAK per USD; used by the dashboard's own check.

exchangeRate.manualOverrideNote: Column K holds the corrected amount, keyed by column L = flow & row.

duplicates._note: Tiers used by the dashboard. Tier A is the one to action first.

tierA.why: A reference number should be unique per bank; a collision is a re-send.

tierC.why: Names absent, so genuine repeats cannot be distinguished. A lead only.

manualOverrides.purposeNote: Column K = flow & row index, column J = the corrected purpose. Wins over every rule.
